name: 10.4" x 12.4" Matted to 8" x 10" Thin Metal Tabletop Frame Brass - Threshold™: Easel Back, Modern Decor
description:
Display your favorite pictures in style with the Matted Thin Metal Tabletop Frame from Threshold™. This thin metal picture frame features a matted gold finish to bring timeless charm to your living room decor. The rectangular photo frame comes with an easel back that enables easy vertical or horizontal display, and the glass front helps protect your photo from dust, dampness and damage. Place it on your console table or bedside table to add a personal touch to your interior decorating.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
